vo.milo.story.miloHello.p3.transcript: How are you? I'm fine, thank you!

vo.milo.story.familyPicnic.p1.transcript: Bea Bunny's family goes to the park.

vo.milo.story.familyPicnic.p2.transcript: Mommy and Daddy carry the blanket.

vo.milo.story.familyPicnic.p3.transcript: Grandma brings the apples. Grandpa brings the bread.

vo.milo.story.familyPicnic.p4.transcript: Sister and brother share the fruit. Yum!

vo.milo.story.familyPicnic.q2.transcript: What did Mommy and Daddy carry?

vo.milo.story.familyPicnic.q3.transcript: Put the picnic story in order.

vo.milo.story.tenLittleDucks.p1.transcript: Ten little ducklings live by the pond.

vo.milo.story.tenLittleDucks.p2.transcript: One, two, three jump in first.

vo.milo.story.tenLittleDucks.p4.transcript: Seven, eight, nine glide so smooth.

vo.milo.story.tenLittleDucks.p6.transcript: Mommy duck smiles. What a happy pond!

vo.milo.story.tenLittleDucks.q3.transcript: Put the ducklings in the order they joined the swim.

mus.helloFriend.transcript: Hello, hello, hello, friend! Hi to you and hi again! Good morning, sunny day, Let's all learn and let's all play! Bye, bye, see you soon! Bye, bye, afternoon! Wave your hand and smile so bright, We'll be back, we're feeling right!

mus.colorsAllAround.transcript: Red like an apple, blue like the sky, Yellow like the sunshine way up high. Green like a leaf, and orange like a pear, Purple like a grape — colors everywhere! Black like the nighttime, white like a cloud, Sing the colors, sing them loud! Red and blue and yellow, green, Beautiful colors to be seen!

mus.countWithMe.transcript: One little duckling, two little ducklings, Three little, four little, five little ducklings, Six little, seven little, eight little ducklings, Nine, ten ducklings in the pond! Count with me, one to ten, Count with me, then again! One, two, three, four, five, Six, seven, eight, nine, ten — alive!
